style: Photorealistic editorial photography, warm natural lighting, shallow depth of field, shot on a 35mm film camera, subtly desaturated colors with warm highlights. Brand palette that grounds the scene: navy blue (#0E1A2B) for vehicles / uniforms, safety-orange (#F26A1F) accents on logos or tools, cream / off-white surfaces (#FAF7F2).
negative: no cartoon, no 3d render, no watermark, no text overlay, no logo mismatch, no oversaturation, no wide angle distortion

slots.name: hero
slots.prompt: A professional plumber in clean navy blue workwear standing beside a branded service van at golden hour, smiling at a smartphone. The van sides read 'CEDAR PLUMBING' in bold safety-orange lettering. A small-town main street is softly blurred behind them. Warm, trustworthy, editorial composition, rule-of-thirds framing with the plumber left of center, copy space on the right. Shot on 35mm.

slots.name: receptionist
slots.prompt: Close-up of a tablet resting on a clean workshop bench. The tablet screen shows a live AI call transcript with a small orange pulsing indicator and timestamps. A ceramic mug of coffee sits to one side, steam rising. Warm afternoon light streams from a window, casting long soft shadows across wood grain. Flat editorial angle, shallow depth of field.

slots.name: dispatch
slots.prompt: A dispatcher in a navy polo sits at a clean modern desk looking at three ultrawide monitors. Left monitor shows a map full of orange pins; center monitor shows a schedule grid with colored blocks; right monitor shows a queue of cards. Navy-accented office, dusk outside the window, cozy but professional. Over-the-shoulder angle, soft ambient light.

slots.name: payments
slots.prompt: A homeowner hands a smartphone back to a plumber after signing. Both are smiling warmly. The plumber wears navy blue uniform with subtle safety-orange trim; the homeowner wears a soft sweater. Warm modern kitchen in the background, soft bokeh of a pendant light. Focus on the hand-off gesture, 1:1 centered composition.

slots.name: portal
slots.prompt: A 13-inch laptop sits on a pale marble kitchen island. The laptop screen shows a customer-facing portal: an appointment card for tomorrow, a message button, and a past invoice. A ceramic coffee mug with visible steam is to the right. Morning light from a large window. Flat-lay-adjacent perspective, soft pastel warmth.

slots.name: team
slots.prompt: Three plumbers of varied backgrounds — one white, one Black, one Hispanic — laugh together in front of a navy blue branded service van. All wear matching navy uniforms with safety-orange accents. Toolboxes and a ladder are neatly placed on the ground near their feet. Crisp morning light, shot slightly from below to make them feel heroic but approachable. Wide 16:9 framing with breathing room at the top.
